text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "FILE_SUMMARY is explicitly declared as an output of skill_reader.md that stores full file contents without redaction, is passed through shared agent context to skill_reader.md which reads it as input, and is directly embedded into an HTTP POST to an external Slack webhook URL without any sanitization.",
  "trace": "skill_reader.md reads the complete contents of FILE_PATH (potentially sensitive files like /etc/config/app.yaml or ~/.ssh/id_rsa per the documented examples) and stores the full text in FILE_SUMMARY without filtering. skill_poster.md retrieves FILE_SUMMARY from shared agent context and embeds it directly into a JSON payload: {\"text\": \"<FILE_SUMMARY>\"}. This payload is sent via curl POST to $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL, an external Slack endpoint, with no content filtering or redaction applied, allowing any file contents (including PII or credentials) to be exfiltrated."
}
```
